title: coupon — TenancyHook + lifecycle hooks
description: Cross-module hook implementations. TenancyHooks are the tenancy module's contract for reacting to tenant-lifecycle events (provision / suspend / erase). Coupons does not register a bootstrapper (nothing to hydrate at tenant-boot — the module resolves per-request), but registers five cascade hooks: refund-cascade clawback, referral-reward-vested issuance, plan-archived cascade, tenant-erasure purge, user-erasure redaction.

hooks.name: ProcessCouponClawbackOnInvoiceRefunded
hooks.purpose: Cascades: dispatches ProcessCouponClawbackJob for the refunded invoice. Reverses any CouponRedemption where applied_to_type='invoice' AND applied_to_id = refund.invoice_id. Sets reversed_at + clawback_reason='refund' + decrements coupon.usage_count. Also handles finance::ChargebackFiled (same shape, clawback_reason='chargeback').
hooks.note: Wave 4 bridge — event ships in Finance module.

hooks.name: IssueCouponOnReferralRewardVested
hooks.purpose: When a ReferralReward.status transitions to vested AND its reward_type IN ('percent_discount', 'fixed_amount'): call CouponIssuer::issueForReferral() to produce a redeemable coupon code. Sets issuance_source='referral' + issuance_context={ referral_program_id, referral_id, referral_reward_id }. Fires CouponIssuedByReferralProgram. Runs at priority 40 (after the vested atomic reward-create transaction commits, before other referral-side listeners).
hooks.note: Wave 5 bridge — reads reward_type from the vested event payload.

hooks.name: CascadeCouponsOnMembershipPlanArchived
hooks.purpose: When a MembershipPlan is archived: find every Coupon where applicability='specific_membership_plans' AND applicable_plan_ids includes the archived plan.id. Remove the archived plan from applicable_plan_ids. If applicable_plan_ids becomes empty: transition the coupon to is_active=false + fire CouponDeactivated with reason='applicable_plan_archived'. Runs at priority 50.
hooks.note: Wave 4 bridge — event ships in Membership module.

hooks.name: PurgeCouponDataForErasedTenant
hooks.purpose: Cascade delete via FK; writes compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics per entity family (coupons / coupon_redemptions purged). Invoice-linked redemptions migrate to compliance_archive.coupon_redemptions prior to cascade (financial-obligation retention). Audit rows outlive the source rows per financial retention.

hooks.name: RedactCouponRedemptionsOnUserErasure
hooks.purpose: GDPR minimisation. When a user is erased as the customer on any CouponRedemption: 90 days post-erasure, redact customer_id + customer_type on the redemption. Retention window unchanged; only PII fields redact. The redemption row stays for the 7-year financial audit trail.

no_bootstrapper.reason: Coupons does not need a tenant-boot hydration path — nothing per-tenant is preloaded into memory at boot. The rate-limit middleware handles per-request context; the coupon config is fetched fresh per validate/preview/redeem call.
